name: each cvd-record disclosure record carries the full field set required for clearinghouse review
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"lodash","severity":"critical","fixed_in":"4.17.21","advisory_id":"GHSA-x","source":"cisa-kev"},{"component":"left-pad","severity":"medium","advisory_id":"GHSA-y","source":"osv"}]' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cvd-record.sh" --findings f.json --json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));const r=j.records[0];process.exit(["advisory_id","severity","component","fixed_in","disclosed_at","remediation_status","source"].every(k=>k in r)?0:1)' && echo c23-full-fields 1>&2
